name: Shin-Nihon Tatemono Co., Ltd.
summary: Shin-Nihon Tatemono Co., Ltd. operates as a real estate developer in Japan. The company develops and sells family and compact condominiums, and residential houses, as well as provides real estate solutions. It also manages and sub-leases condominiums and apartments; provides building renovation services; undertakes various construction projects, such as detached housing projects, apartments and condominiums, and commercial facilities; and offers real estate consulting services. Shin-Nihon Tatemono Co., Ltd. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
